reason: Ready for review: three additive helpers in tests/e2e/conftest.py per WP01 prompt; ruff + mypy --strict + pytest --collect-only all green

review.reference: Review passed: fresh_e2e_project fixture (conftest.py:279-345) deliberately skips .kittify copy and bootstraps via public spec-kitty init only; SourcePollutionBaseline frozen dataclass at conftest.py:42-57 plus capture_source_pollution_baseline (conftest.py:81-108) implements layer-1 git status + layer-2 rglob inventory of kitty-specs/.kittify/.worktrees/docs plus aggregated **/profile-invocations bucket (catches .gitignore-masked writes per FR-018); assert_no_source_pollution (conftest.py:111-145) re-captures both layers and raises with diff; format_subprocess_failure (conftest.py:153-172) emits command/cwd/rc/stdout/stderr per FR-019/NFR-004; existing e2e_project body is byte-identical, REPO_ROOT unchanged, test_cli_smoke.py untouched; zero forbidden-symbol hits (no decide_next_via_runtime, _internal_runtime, etc); no MonkeyPatch.setattr; ruff clean, mypy --strict --follow-imports=silent clean for conftest.py (only pre-existing debt at tests/test_isolation_helpers.py:33 from commit d581aedc1 dated 2026-01-12 surfaces without --follow-imports=silent); pytest --collect-only lists all 6 existing TestFullCLIWorkflow/TestWorkflowEdgeCases tests; commit 35777473 stat shows tests/e2e/conftest.py is the sole owned file modified (+226/-1).
